no: Ranged weapon enchantment pass-through and ammo tweaks
sum: Makes enchanted ranged launchers pass enchantment to ammo, adds recoverable ammunition system, tweaks Eldoth/Jan, and fixes Fuller's quest.

co.no: Makes enchanted bows/xbows/slings pass their enchantment to ammo for resistance bypass. Universally useful QoL
Replaces ammo with charged/reusable versions (45 custom items). Changes ammo economy significantly
Gives Eldoth Arrow of Detonation + composite longbow, removes Create Poison Arrows innate. NPCs don't switch spent ammo and stand idle — ammo management hassle
Removes Jan's Create Special Snare innate ability. Very minimal change
Adds basic bolts to FAI store so Fuller's quest can be completed by buying. Actually a nerf — makes the quest trivial
